brand.name: Alt Text Generator Pro
brand.sharedTagline: Shared account across web, Chrome, Shopify, and WordPress
brand.footer: Alt Text Generator Pro · Accessibility-first image description workflows

landing.title: Alt Text Generator Pro | AI alt text for web, Chrome, Shopify, and WordPress
landing.description: Generate high-quality image alt text with one shared account across the web app, Chrome, Shopify, and WordPress.

app.title: Alt Text Generator Pro App | Generate accessible image descriptions
app.description: Upload images, generate alt text, and manage shared subscriptions and entitlements from the Alt Text Generator Pro web app.

authCallback.title: Signing in | Alt Text Generator Pro
authCallback.description: Complete sign-in for your Alt Text Generator Pro account.

billingSuccess.title: Billing updated | Alt Text Generator Pro
billingSuccess.description: Return to the app and review your latest Alt Text Generator Pro plan and entitlements.

billingCancel.title: Checkout canceled | Alt Text Generator Pro
billingCancel.description: No billing changes were applied. Return to Alt Text Generator Pro whenever you are ready.

hero.title: Ship better accessibility with fast, high-quality alt text.
hero.body: Alt Text Generator Pro helps teams generate accurate alt text at scale. Use the web app for uploads and URL generation, then connect the same account across Chrome, Shopify, and WordPress.
hero.stagingNotice: Staging build: this environment is intended for pre-release validation.

kpis.batchBody: Generate alt text for multiple assets quickly
kpis.info: The same backend intelligence powers the web app, extension, and integrations.

features.title: Built for teams shipping content every day
features.subtitle: Keep visual language consistent, enforce quality, and route through one entitlement-aware account layer.
features.contextBody: Provide optional context and language settings to produce cleaner, more relevant descriptions.
features.subscriptionsBody: Use one account across products, with centralized billing and platform entitlements.
features.metadataBody: Embed generated descriptions into downloaded files for smoother publishing handoff.

platforms.title: Use Alt Text Generator Pro anywhere you work
platforms.subtitle: Start with the web app, then expand to channel-specific workflows.

pricing.title: Pricing that scales with your workflow
pricing.subtitle: Start with trial access, then upgrade to channel-specific or all-access plans in your account dashboard.
pricing.freeBody: Sign in and start with trial eligibility and entitlement-based access checks.
pricing.singleBody: Unlock the channel you need now, with options to expand later.
pricing.allBody: One subscription for Chrome, Shopify, WordPress, and web usage flows.

chrome.title: Chrome Extension
chrome.description: Right-click generation and page-level image capture in your browser.

shopify.title: Shopify App
shopify.description: Connect stores and generate consistent alt text for product workflows.

wordpress.title: WordPress Plugin
wordpress.description: Generate and manage alt text from your WordPress media workflows.

app.signInSharedAccount: Sign in with the same Alt Text Generator Pro account you use in Chrome. Your account, billing, and entitlements are shared across clients.
app.webEntitlementWarning: Your account is signed in, but your current entitlements do not include web generation. Choose a web-enabled plan below.
app.plansSubtitle: Buy the product you need now, or use All Access to unlock every client with one account.

planDescriptions.plan_web: Uploads, URL-based generation, metadata download, and recent history in the web app.
planDescriptions.plan_chrome: Right-click generation, page-level image collection, and the extension full-page workflow.
planDescriptions.plan_shopify: Store-connected product workflows and entitlement-aware generation for Shopify teams.
planDescriptions.plan_wordpress: Shared-account media generation workflows inside WordPress.
planDescriptions.plan_all_access: One subscription that unlocks web, Chrome, Shopify, and WordPress.

app.contextPlaceholder: Project, page, or editorial context to improve descriptions
app.noItems: No images queued yet. Upload files or add an image URL above.
app.metadataUploadOnly: Metadata download is currently available for uploaded files only

messages.invalidImageUrl: Please enter a valid image URL (http/https).
messages.webPlanRequired: Your current plan does not include web generation. Choose a web-enabled plan below.
messages.billingUpdated: Billing updated. Your account status has been refreshed.
messages.billingCancelled: Checkout canceled. No billing changes were applied.
messages.chooseSubscription: Choose a plan below to start your first subscription.
messages.comingSoonPlan: {title} is visible in the catalog but not available for self-serve purchase yet.

disabled.signedOut: Sign in to start generating alt text.
disabled.missingEntitlement: Your current entitlement does not include web generation.

billing.successBody: Returning to the app and reloading your latest plan and entitlement status.
